MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name, s.id LIMIT 100
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'London' RETURN s.name, s.platform_count
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Marylebone' RETURN t.train_number, t.status
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.passenger_id, t.ticket_id, t.price
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.train_id = 'TR001' SET t.status = 'Delayed'
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.incident_id = 'INC2026001' DELETE i
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)<-[:ASSIGNED]-(j:Journey) RETURN s.name, count(j) as journey_count
MATCH (p:Passenger) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.passenger_id, p.name, tc.card_type
MATCH path = (s1:Station)-[:CONNECTS_TO*1..3]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.name = 'Paddington' RETURN path
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) RETURN p.name, r.route_name, j.departure_time
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.date >= '2026-03-01' RETURN ts.date, sum(ts.total_sales) as revenue
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') AND j.departure_time <= datetime('2026-03-25T23:59:59') RETURN j.journey_id, j.departure_time, j.arrival_time
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, count(t) as ticket_count WHERE ticket_count > 5 MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, ticket_count, tc.card_type
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'London' RETURN s.name, s.id UNION MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'Manchester' RETURN s.name, s.id
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, count(t) as train_count WHERE train_count > 10 MATCH (s)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) RETURN s.name, train_count, count(i) as incident_count

MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket)<-[:PURCHASED]-(p:Passenger) WHERE i.severity = 'High' RETURN DISTINCT p.passenger_id, p.name, i.description, r.route_name

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) WITH d, count(sm) as staff_count MATCH (d)-[:MAINTAINS]->(t:Train) RETURN d.depot_name, staff_count, count(t) as trains_maintained, avg(t.last_maintenance_days) as avg_maintenance_interval

MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date >= '2026-03-01' WITH dpl.date AS date, sum(dpl.passenger_count) AS daily_total ORDER BY date WITH collect({date: date, daily_total: daily_total}) AS rows UNWIND range(0, size(rows) - 1) AS i WITH rows[i] AS current, CASE WHEN i > 0 THEN rows[i-1] ELSE null END AS previous RETURN current.date AS date, current.daily_total AS daily_total, CASE WHEN previous IS NOT NULL THEN current.daily_total - previous.daily_total ELSE null END AS change_from_previous

MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:FOR_TRAIN]->(t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED]->(j:Journey) WITH t, count(m) as maintenance_count, count(j) as journey_count WHERE maintenance_count > 3 MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.train_number, maintenance_count, journey_count, collect(DISTINCT s.name) as stations_visited

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH p, count(DISTINCT i) as affected_incidents, count(DISTINCT j) as total_journeys, sum(t.price) as total_spent WHERE affected_incidents > 0 MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t2:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j2:Journey) WHERE j2.departure_time >= datetime('2026-03-01T00:00:00') RETURN p.passenger_id, p.name, p.email, tc.card_type, affected_incidents, total_journeys, total_spent, count(j2) as recent_journeys ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 50
MATCH (p:Platform) RETURN p.platform_id, p.station_id, p.platform_number LIMIT 50
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Active' RETURN t.train_id, t.train_number, t.capacity
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.route_type = 'Express' RETURN r.route_name, r.start_station, r.end_station
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.role = 'Driver' RETURN sm.staff_id, sm.name, sm.license_number
MATCH (d:Depot) RETURN d.depot_id, d.name, d.location, d.capacity
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.train_id = 'TR042' SET t.last_maintenance = datetime()
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.status = 'Resolved' DELETE i
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.email ENDS WITH '@gmail.com' RETURN p.passenger_id, p.name, p.email
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.city IN ['London', 'Birmingham', 'Leeds'] RETURN s.name, s.city, s.zone
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.price > 50 AND t.purchase_date >= '2026-03-01' RETURN t.ticket_id, t.price, t.class
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE r.route_name = 'North Line' RETURN j.journey_id, j.departure_time, j.arrival_time
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.expiry_date < date('2026-04-01') RETURN tc.card_id, tc.card_type, tc.expiry_date
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.maintenance_type = 'Scheduled' RETURN ml.log_id, ml.train_id, ml.maintenance_date
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.date = '2026-03-24' RETURN tss.total_tickets, tss.total_revenue, tss.average_price
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.station_id = 'ST001' RETURN dpl.date, dpl.passenger_count, dpl.peak_hour
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Delayed' RETURN s.name, count(t) as delayed_trains
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.price > 100 RETURN p.name, t.ticket_id, t.price ORDER BY t.price DESC LIMIT 20
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) RETURN r.route_name, count(j) as total_journeys ORDER BY total_journeys DESC
MATCH (t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= datetime('2026-03-25T00:00:00') RETURN t.train_number, count(j) as scheduled_journeys
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, count(sm) as staff_count ORDER BY staff_count DESC
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WHERE i.severity IN ['High', 'Critical'] RETURN r.route_name, count(DISTINCT i) as incident_count, count(j) as affected_journeys

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.card_type = 'Annual' WITH p, tc MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.name, tc.card_id, count(t) as additional_tickets ORDER BY additional_tickets DESC
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:MAINTAINS]->(t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= date('2026-03-20') RETURN d.name, count(DISTINCT t) as trains, count(j) as journeys

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)<-[:ASSIGNED]-(j:Journey) WITH s, count(DISTINCT j) as journey_count MATCH (s)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(p:Platform) RETURN s.name, journey_count, count(p) as platform_count
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, sum(t.price) as revenue RETURN r.route_name, revenue ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Passenger) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, count(t) as tickets OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.passenger_id, p.name, tickets, tc.card_type ORDER BY tickets DESC LIMIT 30

MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:FOR_TRAIN]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.maintenance_date >= '2026-03-01' WITH t, count(ml) as maintenance_count WHERE maintenance_count > 2 MATCH (t)-[:ASSIGNED]->(j:Journey) RETURN t.train_number, maintenance_count, count(j) as journeys

MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.reported_time >= datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') WITH i MATCH (i)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) RETURN i.incident_id, i.severity, count(DISTINCT r) as routes_affected, count(DISTINCT t) as tickets_impacted

MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'London' MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WITH s, count(t) as train_count MATCH (s)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(p:Platform) WITH s, train_count, count(p) as platform_count RETURN s.name, s.zone, train_count, platform_count, train_count * 1.0 / platform_count as trains_per_platform ORDER BY trains_per_platform DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= datetime('2026-03-01T00:00:00') WITH p, sum(t.price) as total_spent, count(j) as journey_count MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, p.email, tc.card_type, total_spent, journey_count, total_spent / journey_count as avg_cost_per_journey ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 25

MATCH (d:Depot)-[:MAINTAINS]->(t:Train) WITH d, count(t) as total_trains MATCH (d)-[:MAINTAINS]->(t2:Train)<-[:FOR_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.maintenance_date >= '2026-03-01' WITH d, total_trains, count(DISTINCT t2) as maintained_this_month RETURN d.name, d.location, total_trains, maintained_this_month, maintained_this_month * 100.0 / total_trains as maintenance_coverage ORDER BY maintenance_coverage DESC

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:ASSIGNED]-(t:Train) WITH r, count(DISTINCT j) as total_journeys, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_used MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.reported_time >= datetime('2026-03-01T00:00:00') RETURN r.route_name, r.route_type, total_journeys, trains_used, count(i) as incidents_this_month, count(i) * 100.0 / total_journeys as incident_rate ORDER BY incident_rate DESC

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot)-[:MAINTAINS]->(t:Train)<-[:FOR_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.maintenance_date >= '2026-03-01' WITH sm, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_handled, count(ml) as logs_processed RETURN sm.staff_id, sm.name, sm.role, trains_handled, logs_processed, logs_processed * 1.0 / trains_handled as avg_logs_per_train ORDER BY logs_processed DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.date >= '2026-03-01' WITH tss.date AS sale_date, sum(tss.total_revenue) AS daily_revenue, sum(tss.total_tickets) AS daily_tickets ORDER BY sale_date WITH collect({sale_date: sale_date, daily_revenue: daily_revenue, daily_tickets: daily_tickets}) AS rows UNWIND range(0, size(rows) - 1) AS i WITH rows[i] AS current, CASE WHEN i > 0 THEN rows[i-1] ELSE null END AS previous RETURN current.sale_date AS sale_date, current.daily_revenue AS daily_revenue, current.daily_tickets AS daily_tickets, current.daily_revenue / current.daily_tickets AS avg_ticket_price, CASE WHEN previous IS NOT NULL THEN current.daily_revenue - previous.daily_revenue ELSE null END AS revenue_change ORDER BY sale_date

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, r, count(j) as route_journeys, sum(t.price) as route_spent WITH p, collect({route: r.route_name, journeys: route_journeys, spent: route_spent}) as route_stats WHERE size(route_stats) > 2 RETURN p.passenger_id, p.name, route_stats, reduce(total = 0, stat IN route_stats | total + stat.spent) as total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)<-[:ASSIGNED]-(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') AND j.departure_time <= datetime('2026-03-25T23:59:59') WITH s, count(DISTINCT j) as departures MATCH (s)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.reported_time >= datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') RETURN s.name, s.city, departures, count(i) as incidents, departures - count(i) * 5 as reliability_score ORDER BY reliability_score DESC LIMIT 30

MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:OWNS]-(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= datetime('2026-03-01T00:00:00') WITH tc.card_type AS card_type, count(DISTINCT p) AS cardholders, sum(t.price) AS total_revenue RETURN card_type, cardholders, total_revenue, total_revenue / cardholders AS revenue_per_cardholder ORDER BY revenue_per_cardholder DESC

MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:FOR_TRAIN]->(t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE ml.maintenance_date >= '2026-03-01' WITH t, ml.maintenance_type as maint_type, count(DISTINCT j) as journeys_after_maint, count(DISTINCT r) as routes_covered MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.train_number, maint_type, journeys_after_maint, routes_covered, count(DISTINCT s) as stations_visited, journeys_after_maint * 1.0 / count(DISTINCT s) as journey_station_ratio ORDER BY journey_station_ratio DESC LIMIT 25

MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket)<-[:PURCHASED]-(p:Passenger) WHERE i.reported_time >= datetime('2026-03-20T00:00:00') WITH i, count(DISTINCT p) as affected_passengers, sum(t.price) as refund_potential MATCH (i)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(sm:StaffMember) OPTIONAL MATCH (i)-[:RESOLVED_BY]->(sm2:StaffMember) RETURN i.incident_id, i.severity, i.description, affected_passengers, refund_potential, sm.name as reporter, sm2.name as resolver, i.resolution_time_minutes ORDER BY refund_potential DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date >= '2026-03-01' WITH dpl.station_id AS station_id, dpl.date AS log_date, dpl.passenger_count AS count MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.id = station_id WITH s, log_date, count ORDER BY log_date WITH s, collect({date: log_date, count: count}) AS daily_data RETURN s.name, s.city, daily_data, size(daily_data) AS days_logged, reduce(total = 0, d IN daily_data | total + d.count) AS total_passengers, reduce(total = 0, d IN daily_data | total + d.count) * 1.0 / size(daily_data) AS avg_daily_passengers ORDER BY avg_daily_passengers DESC LIMIT 20
MATCH (p:Platform) WHERE p.platform_number > 5 RETURN p.platform_id, p.platform_number
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.model = 'Express-500' RETURN t.train_id, t.manufacturing_year
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.shift = 'Night' RETURN sm.staff_id, sm.name, sm.contact_number
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.train_id = 'TR099' SET t.inspection_due = date('2026-04-15')
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.maintenance_date < '2025-01-01' DETACH DELETE ml
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:CONNECTS_TO]-(neighbor:Station) RETURN s.name, count(neighbor) as connections
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.passenger_id, count(t) as total_tickets ORDER BY total_tickets DESC LIMIT 50
MATCH (t:Ticket) RETURN t.class, count(*) as count, avg(t.price) as avg_price
MATCH (j:Journey) RETURN avg(j.duration_minutes) as avg_duration, max(j.duration_minutes) as max_duration
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) RETURN r.route_name, count(j) as usage_count ORDER BY usage_count DESC
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.status = 'Open' RETURN i.incident_id, i.reported_time, duration.between(i.reported_time, datetime()).minutes as open_duration
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) RETURN d.name, count(sm) as staff_count
MATCH (d:Depot) RETURN d.name, d.capacity, d.current_train_count, d.current_train_count * 100.0 / d.capacity as usage_percent
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.expiry_date < date() RETURN tc.card_id, tc.owner_id, tc.expiry_date
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) RETURN ts.date, ts.total_revenue ORDER BY ts.date DESC LIMIT 30
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) as total_spent WHERE total_spent > 1000 RETURN p.name, total_spent
MATCH (t:Train)<-[:FOR_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WITH t, count(ml) as logs WHERE logs < 3 RETURN t.train_id, t.last_maintenance
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Delayed' RETURN s.name, count(t) as delayed_count
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) RETURN dpl.date, dpl.peak_hour, dpl.passenger_count ORDER BY dpl.passenger_count DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) RETURN i.severity, count(r) as routes_affected
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.certification_expiry < date('2026-06-01') RETURN sm.staff_id, sm.role, sm.certification_expiry
MATCH (t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED]->(j:Journey) WITH t, count(j) as journeys MATCH (t) RETURN t.train_id, journeys, t.capacity, journeys * 1.0 / t.capacity as utilization
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'Cancelled' RETURN t.ticket_id, t.price, t.refund_status
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(p:Platform) WITH s, count(p) as platforms MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN s.name, platforms, count(t) as trains, count(t)*1.0/platforms as congestion

MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'Cancelled' WITH date(j.departure_time) as day, count(j) as cancelled MATCH (j2:Journey) WHERE date(j2.departure_time) = day WITH day, cancelled, count(j2) as total RETURN day, cancelled, total, cancelled*100.0/total as cancellation_rate
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.passenger_type = 'Commute' RETURN p.city, count(*) as commuter_count
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE r.start_city <> r.end_city RETURN p.passenger_id, count(DISTINCT r.start_city) as cities_visited
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog) RETURN ml.maintenance_type, sum(ml.cost) as total_cost ORDER BY total_cost DESC
MATCH (i:Incident) RETURN i.type, count(*) as frequency, avg(i.resolution_time_minutes) as avg_resolution
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WITH r, count(j) as total, sum(CASE WHEN j.status = 'On Time' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as on_time RETURN r.route_name, on_time * 100.0 / total as reliability_score

MATCH (p1:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t2:Ticket)<-[:PURCHASED]-(p2:Passenger) WHERE p1 <> p2 RETURN p1.passenger_id, p2.passenger_id, count(j) as shared_journeys LIMIT 50
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH sm, count(s) as stations MATCH (sm)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) RETURN sm.name, stations, d.name as home_depot
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:MAINTAINS]->(t:Train) WITH d, count(t) as trains MATCH (d)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(sm:StaffMember) RETURN d.name, trains, count(sm) as staff, trains * 1.0 / count(sm) as trains_per_staff
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WITH ts.date as date, ts.total_revenue as rev, ts.hour as hour RETURN date, hour, sum(rev) as hourly_revenue ORDER BY date, hour
MATCH (j1:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j2:Journey) WHERE j1.departure_time < j2.arrival_time AND j1.arrival_time > j2.departure_time RETURN r.route_name, count(*) as overlaps
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) WHERE i.status = 'Resolved' RETURN i.incident_id, sum(t.price) as potential_refund_cost

MATCH (p:Passenger) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH p, tc OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(st:Ticket) RETURN p.passenger_id, CASE WHEN tc IS NOT NULL THEN 'Cardholder' ELSE 'Single Ticket Only' END as type, count(st) as single_tickets
MATCH (t:Train) WITH t, datetime().year - t.manufacturing_year as age RETURN t.train_id, age, t.status, CASE WHEN age > 10 THEN 'Old' ELSE 'New' END as lifecycle_stage
MATCH path = (s1:Station)-[:CONNECTS_TO*2..4]-(s2:Station) WHERE s1.city = 'London' AND s2.city = 'Edinburgh' RETURN path, length(path) as hops LIMIT 10

MATCH (s:Station) WITH s MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WITH s, count(t) as trains MATCH (s)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH s, trains, count(i) as incidents MATCH (s)<-[:LOCATED_AT]-(p:Platform) WITH s, trains, incidents, count(p) as platforms MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.station_id = s.id WITH s, trains, incidents, platforms, sum(dpl.passenger_count) as traffic RETURN s.name, trains, incidents, platforms, traffic, CASE WHEN (trains * platforms) > 0 THEN (traffic * incidents) / (trains * platforms) ELSE 0 END as risk_score ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 20
